title: Free Trial: Automate Your SaaS Delivery and Operations with Corent
description: In collaboration with AWS, Corent’s SaaSOps™ is the fastest, most affordable way for startups to SaaSify their application and publish to AWS Marketplace as a transactable SaaS offering. Within days of easy configuration, this offer allows startups to test the results for free!
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
value: Free Trial: Automate Your SaaS Delivery and Operations with Corent
